lockpick.name: lockpick
lockpick.lore: A finely tapered length of hardened wire, bent at precise angles by someone who understood locks as a language. Thieves' guilds the world over guard the secret of their manufacture jealously, for a good pick is worth more than the gold it might liberate.

master_lockpick.name: master lockpick
master_lockpick.lore: Crafted from a single strand of spell-hardened gold, this exceptional tool is said to whisper the correct angle to its wielder's fingertips. The master picksmith who forged it reportedly never failed a lock in forty years of work.
